items.headline: Astera Labs (NASDAQ: ALAB) reports record Q1 2026 results with 93% YoY revenue growth and strong margins
Astera Labs (Nasdaq: ALAB) launches and begins shipping Scorpio X-Series 320-lane AI fabric switch and expands Scorpio P-Series PCIe-6 family
Astera Labs (Nasdaq: ALAB) expands Scorpio X-Series smart fabric switch roadmap and accelerates development to address $20B merchant scale-up switching market by 2030
Astera Labs (Nasdaq: ALAB) opens new AI scale-up fabric R&D design center in Israel to expand engineering operations
Astera Labs (Nasdaq: ALAB) to participate in multiple Q2 2026 investor conferences hosted by J.P. Morgan, TD Cowen, and Evercore
